title: gymnogramma retrofracta
intro: Gymnogramma retrofracta, also known as the fern-like Gymnogramma, is a type of fern that belongs to the family Pteridaceae. This plant has been traditionally used in medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial activities. The health benefits of Gymnogramma retrofracta include its ability to reduce inflammation, improve digestion, and boost the immune system. The herbal preparations of this plant are typically made into teas, infusions, or tinctures, and can be used to treat a range of health issues, from skin conditions to gastrointestinal problems.
